arkhe 1.4.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Function reference

Data cleaning

compact() compact_cols() compact_rows()
Remove Empty Rows/Columns
count()
Count Values Using a Predicate
detect()
Find Rows/Columns Using a Predicate
discard() discard_cols() discard_rows()
Remove Rows/Columns Using a Predicate
remove_empty() replace_empty()
Tools for Working With Empty String
remove_Inf() replace_Inf()
Tools for Working With Infinite Values
keep() keep_cols() keep_rows()
Keep Rows/Columns Using a Predicate
remove_NA() replace_NA()
Tools for Working With Missing Values
remove_constant()
Remove Constant Columns
remove_zero() replace_zero()
Tools for Working With Zeros

Data transformation

append_rownames()
Convert Row Names to an Explicit Column
assign_colnames() assign_rownames()
Assign a Specific Row/Column to the Column/Row Names

Scales

scale_range()
Rescale Continuous Vector

Predicates

is_square() is_symmetric()
Matrix Predicates
is_zero() is_odd() is_even() is_positive() is_negative() is_whole()
Numeric Predicates
is_scalar_list() is_scalar_atomic() is_scalar_vector() is_scalar_numeric() is_scalar_integer() is_scalar_double() is_scalar_character() is_scalar_logical()
Scalar Type Predicates
is_constant() is_increasing() is_decreasing() is_greater() is_lower()
Numeric Trend Predicates
is_list() is_atomic() is_vector() is_numeric() is_integer() is_double() is_character() is_logical() is_error() is_warning() is_message()
Type Predicates
has_length() has_names() has_duplicates() has_missing() has_infinite() is_empty() is_unique()
Utility Predicates

Validation

assert_empty() assert_filled() assert_length() assert_lengths() assert_dimensions() assert_names() assert_dimnames() assert_rownames() assert_colnames()
Check Object Attributes
assert_missing() assert_infinite() assert_unique()
Check Data
assert_symmetric() assert_square()
Check Matrix
assert_lower() assert_greater()
Check Numeric Relations
assert_constant() assert_decreasing() assert_increasing()
Check Numeric Trend
assert_count() assert_whole() assert_positive() assert_negative() assert_odd() assert_even()
Check Numeric Values
assert_type() assert_scalar() assert_function()
Check Data Types
needs()
Check the Availability of a Package
validate()
Validate a Condition

Statistics

confidence_binomial()
Confidence Interval for Binomial Proportions
confidence_mean()
Confidence Interval for a Mean
confidence_multinomial()
Confidence Interval for Multinomial Proportions
interval_credible()
Bayesian Credible Interval
interval_hdr()
Highest Density Regions

Resampling

bootstrap()
Bootstrap Estimation
jackknife()
Jackknife Estimation

Mathematics

math_gcd()
Greatest Common Divisor
math_lcm()
Least Common Multiple

Utilities

`%+%`
Concatenate
`%||%`
Default value for NULL

On this page

arkhe is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau, Université Bordeaux Montaigne, CNRS.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.
